title: LK7k-16.1.0.150SP09-OP001PF001AZ-16.1.0.160SP04-OP004PF001AZ_20260409144726
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
LK7k-16.1.0.160SP04(OP004PF001AZ)

Camera
1. Fixed the issue where Camera could open to a black screen and photos could not be taken.
2. Fixed the issues where video recording in Camera could freeze.
3. Fixed the issue of severe overheating while the phone was charging, and improved charging temperature control.

System
1. Fixed the occasional no-sound issue when playing videos.
2. Fixed the issue with scrolling screenshots on app comment pages.
3. Fixed the issue of incorrect display after the sunrise wallpaper was applied.
4. Fixed the issue where, with a depth effect wallpaper applied, the pet image could briefly appear on the AOD screen after entering the lock screen editing page and turning the screen off.
5. Fixed the issue where alarms would only start ringing more than 10 seconds after appearing.
6. Optimized Pocket Mode to improve mistouch prevention sensitivity.

Stability
1. Fixed the issue where the phone could overheat severely during gaming.
2. Fixed the issue where pop-ups in some apps would not respond when tapped.

Smoothness
1. Optimized heat dissipation during gaming to help improve running smoothness.
2. Fixed the issue of severe frame drops when gaming at maximum graphics settings for smoother gameplay.
3. Fixed lag issues in some apps.

Reminding
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (https://tspot.tecno.com) for more information.
